response.justification: Bogdan's expertise is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. While he has some C++ experience from 10+ years ago at National Instruments and in academic projects, his professional focus for the last decade has been web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang). He lacks demonstrated Windows platform C++ development, strong SQL Server/Oracle experience, and critically, has no financial services or capital markets domain knowledge. The mandatory technical skills (5-10 years recent C++ on Windows, strong SQL) are absent from his current competency profile.
strengths: Strong communication skills demonstrated through talks, workshops, and open-source leadership
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and rapidly acquire new domains
Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines and software infrastructure from consulting experience
concerns: Minimal C++ experience from 10+ years ago with no recent professional C++ work or Windows platform development
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise; only generic SQL and MySQL experience
Complete absence of Financial Services, Capital Markets, or Fixed Income domain knowledge or exposure
